articles.title: Tomorrow’s Smart Pills Will Deliver Drugs and Take Biopsies
articles.summary: One day soon, a doctor might prescribe a pill that doesn’t just deliver medicine but also reports back on what it finds inside you—and then takes actions based on its findings.Instead of scheduling an endoscopy or CT scan, you’d swallow an electronic capsule smaller than a multivitamin.
